verses.text: He showed 'a pure river of water of life,' and 'the tree of life,' whose leaves were 'for the healing of the nations.' Living river. Eden restored, life flows from God's throne.
He showed 'a pure river of water of life,' and 'the tree of life,' whose leaves were 'for the healing of the nations.' Living river. Eden restored, life flows from God's throne.
'There shall be no more curse'; His servants 'shall see his face,' and 'they shall reign for ever and ever.' No curse. The redeemed behold God and reign with Him.
'There shall be no more curse'; His servants 'shall see his face,' and 'they shall reign for ever and ever.' No curse. The redeemed behold God and reign with Him.
'There shall be no more curse'; His servants 'shall see his face,' and 'they shall reign for ever and ever.' No curse. The redeemed behold God and reign with Him.
'These sayings are faithful and true'; 'Behold, I come quickly: blessed is he that keepeth' the words of this prophecy. Come quickly. The Lord's soon coming is a blessing to the faithful.
'These sayings are faithful and true'; 'Behold, I come quickly: blessed is he that keepeth' the words of this prophecy. Come quickly. The Lord's soon coming is a blessing to the faithful.
John fell to worship the angel, but is told, 'See thou do it not... worship God.' Worship God. No creature, however glorious, may be worshipped.
John fell to worship the angel, but is told, 'See thou do it not... worship God.' Worship God. No creature, however glorious, may be worshipped.
'Seal not the sayings,' for the time is at hand; 'he that is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is holy.' Fixed. The day comes when each is sealed in his state.
'Seal not the sayings,' for the time is at hand; 'he that is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is holy.' Fixed. The day comes when each is sealed in his state.
'Behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me'; 'I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end.' Coming Judge. The first and last brings each his due.
'Behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me'; 'I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end.' Coming Judge. The first and last brings each his due.
'Blessed are they that do his commandments,' with right to the tree of life; without are dogs, sorcerers, and liars. In and out. The pure enter; the impure remain without.
'Blessed are they that do his commandments,' with right to the tree of life; without are dogs, sorcerers, and liars. In and out. The pure enter; the impure remain without.
'I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.' 'The Spirit and the bride say, Come.' The invitation. Christ Himself calls the thirsty to come.
'I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.' 'The Spirit and the bride say, Come.' The invitation. Christ Himself calls the thirsty to come.
He warns none add to or take from 'the words of the book of this prophecy,' lest God add plagues or remove his part. Guard the word. God's revelation must not be tampered with.
He warns none add to or take from 'the words of the book of this prophecy,' lest God add plagues or remove his part. Guard the word. God's revelation must not be tampered with.
He testifies, 'Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus.' 'The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.' Come, Lord. The Bible ends longing for Christ's return.
